category_sources: Official GitHub README describes gauth as a terminal replacement for Google Authenticator.
source_facts.description says Google Authenticator in your terminal.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gauth; official repository title is pcarrier/gauth.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface with installation and usage instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/pcarrier/gauth, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README documents secrets storage and TOTP usage.
source_facts.description identifies Google Authenticator terminal use.
